_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox at Tigers Lineups: Game moved up to 6:10 as Sox avoid Skubal
items.snark: Sox dodging Skubal like he's a process server with a restraining order from the offense.

items.headline: Monday Morning Brushback: With Celtics and Bruins done, Red Sox take center stage
items.snark: Center stage means everyone gets to watch you suck in high definition now.

items.headline: Red Sox could use opener ahead of Bello in effort to get righthander back on track
items.snark: Bello needs an opener like I need four drinks before Monday conference calls.

items.headline: Ranger Suarez hopeful he will be ready for next scheduled start after hamstring scare
items.snark: Hopeful is doing a lot of heavy lifting in that sentence buddy.

items.headline: Red Sox need to start identifying their real problems
items.snark: Real problem is you fired the one guy who knew how to win baseball games.

items.headline: Jarren Duran is getting hot after launching third homer of the season
items.snark: Three homers by May 5 is like showing up to a firefight with a Super Soaker.

items.headline: Sonny Gray to throw bullpen session Monday, could be activated Wednesday vs Tigers
items.snark: Gray could be back Wednesday which is great because the rotation is held together with duct tape and prayer.

items.headline: Willson Contreras says Red Sox looser without Cora but team still needs to be better
items.snark: Looser like your jeans after you stop giving a damn about the gym in February.

items.headline: Marcelo Mayer takes exception to teammate blaming young players for offensive woes
items.snark: Mayer told Contreras to stop blaming kids and start blaming the lineup construction from hell.

items.headline: Red Sox lead majors in defensive runs saved but offense remains MLB worst
items.snark: Best defense worst offense is the baseball version of being really good at foreplay but terrible in bed.

items.headline: Ceddanne Rafaela and Trevor Story on field tiff described as water under the bridge
items.snark: Water under the bridge is code for we are absolutely still mad at each other.

items.headline: Red Sox sent Nate Eaton back to Worcester to call up Jake Bennett for Astros start
items.snark: Eaton got called up and demoted faster than my ex changed her relationship status.

items.headline: Patriots defense building on new normal entering 2026 season under Zak Kuhr
items.snark: New normal means Kuhr gets to call blitzes without asking permission from a boomer.

items.headline: Patriots enter second phase of offseason workout program on Monday
items.snark: Phase two is when they turn the music up and actually let you touch a football.

items.headline: Patriots way too early 53 man roster projection after the NFL Draft
items.snark: Way too early is right we haven't even seen these guys in pads yet settle down.

items.headline: Drake Maye and Mike Vrabel named No 1 Most Influential Bostonians
items.snark: Most influential for making everyone forget about the Belichick era in one Super Bowl run.

items.headline: Christian Gonzalez voices support for Mike Vrabel amid Dianna Russini scandal
items.snark: Gonzalez backing Vrabel like a good soldier even though everyone knows this is messy.

items.headline: Patriots scouting department sees more turnover after 2026 NFL Draft
items.snark: Scouting turnover is great for morale said no one in the building ever.

items.headline: Robert Spillane praises Vinny DePalma taking over inside linebackers coaching role
items.snark: DePalma gets promoted and Spillane gets to pretend he's excited about learning new terminology.

items.headline: Patriots reportedly sign first draft pick Karon Prunty to four year rookie contract
items.snark: Prunty signed which means the Patriots finally have someone who can cover a slant route.
